info.title: Logistics - bg.logistics.shippingservices.get
info.description: The bg.logistics.shippingservices.get interface is for sellers to retrieve supported shipping carriers based on package dimensions and weight, which allows sellers to quickly determine which carriers can handle shipment based on the provided package weight and volume information. This interface simplifies the process of selecting the right shipping option, ensuring packages arrive safely and on time.

post.summary: The bg.logistics.shippingservices.get interface is for sellers to retrieve supported shipping carriers based on package dimensions and weight, which allows sellers to quickly determine which carriers can handle shipment based on the provided package weight and volume information. This interface simplifies the process of selecting the right shipping option, ensuring packages arrive safely and on time.
post.description: The bg.logistics.shippingservices.get interface is for sellers to retrieve supported shipping carriers based on package dimensions and weight, which allows sellers to quickly determine which carriers can handle shipment based on the provided package weight and volume information. This interface simplifies the process of selecting the right shipping option, ensuring packages arrive safely and on time.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.logistics.shippingservices.get`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: weight
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The weight of the package. For local U.S. orders, this filed should be input with integer and the decimal places should be input by extendWeight. For Non-local U.S. orders, two decimal places are filled in by default.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: weightUnit
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The unit of the weight. The weight unit for packages in the United States is "lb" while in other countries it is "kg".

x-temu-request-parameters.name: extendWeight
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The extend weight of the package. For local U.S. orders, the decimal places are filled with integer through this parameter while extendWeightUnit is "oz".

x-temu-request-parameters.name: extendWeightUnit
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The unit of the extend weight. For local U.S. orders, the extend weight unit for packages is "oz".

x-temu-request-parameters.name: length
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The length of the package, the length should be input with two decimal places.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: width
x-temu-request-parameters.description: width of the package, width should be input with two decimal places.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: height
x-temu-request-parameters.description: height of the package, height should be input with two decimal places

x-temu-request-parameters.name: dimensionUnit
x-temu-request-parameters.description: dimension(eg:length/width/height) Unit. The dimension unit for packages in the United States is "in". while in other countries it is "cm"

x-temu-request-parameters.name: signatureOnDelivery
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Is Signature Required for Delivery Confirmation?

rows.Error Message: The current parent order has a pending risk control alert, It is not recommended to proceed with the performance. You can submit a cancellation request.
Only one of orderSnList or <parentOrderSn, orderSn>list can be passed in.
At least one of orderSnList and <parentOrderSn, orderSn>list must be passed in.
This orderSn does not exist under the specified parentOrderSn.
Incomplete warehouse details. Update in Seller Central to process shipment.
Orders {*} need to sign on delivery. Please request the field "signatureOnDelivery" with "True".
The parentOrder or Order is invalid. Please check if the parentOrder matches the Order, the parentOrder or Order is nonexistent etc.
The parameter Weight should be integer.
The parentOrder or Order is invalid. Please check if the parentOrder matches the Order, the parentOrder or Order is nonexistent etc.

The request area is incorrect. Please check the request area and replace it with the correct request area. The request area for the United States is US, and the request area for other non-European countries is global.
